sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: RLI CORP (NYSE:RLI) Posts Strong Q4 Beat Despite Muted Market Reaction
feed.summary: RLI CORP (NYSE:RLI) reported a strong fourth quarter for 2025, exceeding analyst expectations for both earnings per share ($0.94 vs $0.807) and revenue ($465.7 million vs $395.2 million). Despite these positive results and achieving its 30th consecutive year of underwriting profitability, the stock experienced a muted to negative reaction in after-hours trading. The company also highlighted significant full-year performance, including a 33% increase in book value per share and its 50th consecutive year of regular dividend increases.

feed.title: Sallie Mae (NASDAQ:SLM) Exceeds Q4 CY2025 Expectations
feed.summary: Sallie Mae (NASDAQ:SLM) exceeded Wall Street's expectations for Q4 CY2025 revenue, with sales up 16.4% year-on-year to $454.1 million, and GAAP profit significantly above estimates at $1.12 per share. Despite missing net interest income estimates and providing slightly lower EPS guidance for 2026, the company's stock rose 4.3% following the solid quarterly results. The article notes the company's sluggish 2% annualized revenue growth over the last five years but highlights an improved 4.7% growth over the past two years.

feed.title: SLM Corp (NASDAQ:SLM) Beats Q4 Earnings Estimates and Announces $500 Million Share Buyback
feed.summary: SLM Corp (Sallie Mae) reported Q4 2025 earnings that significantly beat analyst expectations, with non-GAAP EPS of $1.12 against an estimate of $0.94. Despite mixed revenue figures, the company's shares surged after-market due to the strong earnings beat and the announcement of a new $500 million share repurchase program. This new program, running concurrently with an existing one, signals management's confidence in the company's financial health, driving positive investor sentiment.

feed.title: SLM INVESTOR REMINDER: SLM Corporation a/k/a Sallie Mae Investors Have Until February 17, 2026 To Seek Lead Plaintiff Role
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP reminds investors of SLM Corporation (Sallie Mae) that they have until February 17, 2026, to seek the lead plaintiff role in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that SLM made false or misleading statements regarding early stage delinquencies and the effectiveness of its loss mitigation programs between July 25, 2025, and August 14, 2025. This reminder follows a significant decline in SLM's stock price after a report from TD Cowen contradicted the company's assurances about delinquency rates.

feed.title: IperionX Secures Titanium Order from American Rheinmetall
feed.summary: IperionX has secured a $300,000 prototype order from American Rheinmetall to produce 700 lightweight titanium components for US Army heavy ground combat vehicles. The components, made from 100% recycled titanium using IperionX's patented low-cost technologies, are expected to reduce component weight by 40-45%. This deal supports US priorities to re-shore critical materials supply chains and expand domestic manufacturing.

feed.title: UTime Ltd schedules extraordinary general meeting for January 26
feed.summary: UTime Ltd (NASDAQ:UTME) announced it will hold an extraordinary general meeting for shareholders on January 26, 2026, at 10:00 AM EST. Both Class A and Class B ordinary shareholders are invited to the meeting. The specific agenda items were not disclosed in the SEC filing.

feed.title: Genesco amends credit agreement to extend maturity and adjust interest rates
feed.summary: Genesco Inc. announced it has amended its credit agreement with Bank of America, N.A., extending the maturity date to January 16, 2031. The amendment maintains borrowing base calculations and collateral, while modifying interest rate calculations for both Canadian and domestic borrowings. It also introduces a new level to the pricing grid for revolving credit facility margins, ranging from 1.25% to 1.75% for Term SOFR, Term CORRA, and alternative currency loans.

feed.title: National Advertising Review Board Finds T-Mobile Failed to Comply with Panel Recommendations
feed.summary: The National Advertising Review Board (NARB) has concluded that T-Mobile US, Inc. failed to comply with recommendations regarding its cellular service cost savings claims. Despite previous NARB decisions and T-Mobile's agreements to comply, the company continued to use advertising that NARB found misleading, particularly concerning disclaimers about how savings are achieved. NARB determined that T-Mobile had not made a bona fide attempt to comply, but instead of referring the matter to the FTC, T-Mobile will petition the NAD to re-open the proceeding with new substantiation.

feed.title: A Look At Federal Realty (FRT) Valuation After Portfolio Recycling Draws Analyst Support For 2026
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) is attracting analyst attention due to its portfolio reshuffle through asset sales and acquisitions. Despite recent minor share price declines, its 5-year return shows consistent momentum. The stock is currently trading at a P/E of 26.2x, which is below peer and industry averages, suggesting it may be undervalued, and a DCF model further indicates a 28.9% discount to its estimated future cash flow value.

feed.title: Amgen Faces 340B Lawsuit Spotlighting Drug Pricing And Investor Risks
feed.summary: Amgen is facing a lawsuit from Sagebrush Health Services, accusing the company of improperly ending discounted drug sales under the 340B Drug Pricing Program and attempting to claw back millions in past discounts. This case highlights drug pricing practices and could impact Amgen's relationships with nonprofit clinics and its 340B policies. Investors should monitor court filings, earnings call mentions, and broader policy responses regarding the 340B program.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group (NYSE:PFG) Sets New 52-Week High - Here's Why
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (NYSE:PFG) shares recently hit a new 52-week high of $92.69, driven by solid Q3 earnings that surpassed analyst estimates. Despite mixed analyst ratings, with an average "Reduce" and price target of $92.89, the company demonstrates strong fundamentals, a market capitalization of $20.53 billion, and recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.79 per share, offering a 3.4% yield. Insider selling has also occurred, with executives reducing their holdings.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: CSX Q4 2025 sees mixed results, stock dips
feed.summary: CSX Corporation reported mixed results for Q4 2025, with an EPS of $0.42 beating the forecast of $0.41, but revenue of $3.51 billion falling short of the anticipated $3.55 billion. The company experienced a 1% decline in revenue and a 7% decrease in EPS year-over-year, alongside a 9% drop in operating income. Despite ongoing challenges like soft industrial demand and $50 million in cost structure adjustment expenses, CSX anticipates low single-digit revenue growth and operating margin expansion of 200-300 basis points for 2026, driven by workforce optimization and operational efficiency.

feed.title: Improperly patched bug exploited again in Fortinet firewalls
feed.summary: A recently 'patched' vulnerability in Fortinet's FortiGate firewalls, CVE-2025-59718, is being actively exploited again due to an improper fix, allowing attackers to bypass Single Sign-On, create admin accounts, and steal configuration files. Fortinet confirmed the persistence of the vulnerability even in updated firmware, advising users to disable the SSO login feature as a preventative measure. The article also covers various other cybersecurity news, including breaches, new zero-days, and recent threat intelligence.

feed.title: SLM Reports Solid Q4 Results with Improved Net Interest Margin
feed.summary: SLM Corporation (SLM) announced its Q4 financial results, reporting net interest income of $377 million and an improved net interest margin of 5.21%. Despite not meeting analyst expectations for net interest income, the CEO highlighted strong performance throughout 2025 with increased originations and a new private credit partnership. The company, a major player in education finance, is strategically positioned for future growth, balancing financial challenges with cautious optimism from analysts and favorable valuation metrics.

feed.title: Uber should address how it deals with allegations of drivers assaulting passengers, NY comptroller says
feed.summary: New York State Comptroller Thomas DiNapoli has filed a shareholder proposal urging Uber to increase transparency regarding how it handles allegations of driver assault and sexual harassment. The proposal, made on behalf of the New York State Common Retirement Fund, highlights reports of 400,000 incidents between 2017 and 2022, emphasizing the need for passenger safety and restoring trust in the company. Uber's head of safety for the Americas, Hannah Nilles, acknowledged the traumatic nature of sexual assault but also noted challenges in investigating vague or fraudulent claims.

feed.title: T-Mobile Announces Redemption of 4.750% Senior Notes due February 1, 2028
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, T-Mobile USA, Inc., will redeem on February 1, 2026, the full outstanding aggregate principal amount of its 4.750% Senior Notes due 2028. This redemption includes both the $1.5 billion outstanding public notes and another $1.5 billion held by Deutsche Telekom AG, at a price equal to 100% of the principal amount plus accrued unpaid interest. The announcement clarifies that this press release does not constitute a notice of redemption or an offer to sell or solicit securities.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin awarded $9.6 million Navy contract for combat systems By Investing.com
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin's Rotary and Mission Systems division has secured a $9.58 million Navy contract modification for combat system integration and testing on littoral combat ships and unmanned surface vessels. The work, expected to be completed by February 2027, will be performed across multiple U.S. locations, with significant portions in Seattle, Washington, and Moorestown, New Jersey. The contract is funded by fiscal 2026 and 2025 Navy funds and is managed by Naval Sea Systems Command.

feed.title: The Truth About Ventas Inc (VTR): Boring Name, Wild Dividend Play Everyone’s Sleeping On
feed.summary: Ventas Inc (VTR) is presented as an under-the-radar real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on healthcare properties and senior living, offering a steady dividend for long-term investors. Despite its "boring" name, the article suggests it's a solid play due to the aging population megatrend, offering a stable income stream rather than quick gains. It contrasts VTR with competitors like Welltower Inc (WELL), positioning Ventas as a value-leaning option for those seeking consistent payouts and portfolio stability.

feed.title: Delta Airlines cancelling flights in Louisiana due to incoming winter storm
feed.summary: Delta Airlines is canceling flights in five states, including Louisiana, due to an approaching winter storm. The cancellations are intended to ensure customer and staff safety. Customers affected by these cancellations will be re-booked on the next available itinerary, and travel waivers have been issued for Eastern North America and central/southeastern US regions.

feed.title: A Look At TriCo Bancshares (TCBK) Valuation After Earnings Beat And New Share Buyback Program
feed.summary: TriCo Bancshares (TCBK) recently exceeded analyst expectations for its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings and announced a new share repurchase program for up to 2 million shares. While its Price-to-Earnings ratio of 14.1x suggests it's slightly overvalued compared to its peers and the industry average, a Discounted Cash Flow model indicates the stock might be undervalued by approximately 31.1%. Investors are presented with conflicting valuation signals, prompting a deeper look into the company's risks and growth potential.

feed.title: UAL Stock Taking Flight After Earnings Confirm Strong Demand
feed.summary: United Airlines (UAL) stock is up over 2% after strong Q4 2025 earnings, reporting record revenue of $15.4 billion and EPS of $3.10, despite a government shutdown. The airline benefited from robust demand from higher-income and corporate travelers, aligning with a K-shaped economic recovery also seen by Delta. With a favorable forward P/E and analyst price targets indicating significant upside, including a consensus of $134.94, UAL is seen as a strong buy for both traders and long-term investors.

feed.title: West Fraser Schedules Feb. 12 Analyst Call on Q4 2025 Results
feed.summary: West Fraser Timber Co. (TSE:WFG) is set to release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial and operating results on February 11, 2026, followed by an analyst conference call on February 12, chaired by President and CEO Sean McLaren. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates TSE:WFG as Neutral due to challenging financial performance, valuation concerns, and operational challenges, despite a strong balance sheet. The company is a diversified wood products producer with over 50 facilities across multiple countries.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Texas Pacific Land (TPL) After Its Recent Share Price Rebound
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land (TPL) has seen a recent rebound in its share price but appears overvalued based on Simply Wall St's valuation framework. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 12.4% above its intrinsic value of $307.59 per share, and its P/E ratio of 50.0x is significantly higher than the Oil and Gas industry average of 13.5x and its Fair Ratio of 18.7x. The article encourages investors to use "Narratives" on the Simply Wall St platform to explore different assumptions and form their own conclusions about TPL's fair value.

feed.title: The Truth About Automatic Data Processing (ADP): Boring Name, Wildly Strong Stock – Should You Jum
feed.summary: The article discusses Automatic Data Processing (ADP), highlighting its status as a stable, dividend-paying company despite its "boring" image. It emphasizes ADP's consistent stock performance, crucial role in payroll and HR services, and strong recurring revenue model. The author concludes that ADP is a valuable long-term core holding for serious investors, rather than a speculative, high-hype stock.

feed.title: AptarGroup Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.48 a Share, Payable Feb. 25 to Shareholders of Record on Feb. 4
feed.summary: AptarGroup announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.48 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on February 25 to shareholders of record as of February 4. This information indicates the company's consistent dividend policy.

feed.title: Capital One acquires fintech firm Brex
feed.summary: Capital One has announced the acquisition of Brex, a financial technology firm. This move signifies Capital One's continued expansion into the fintech sector.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Wins Preliminary Approval of Derivative Settlement
feed.summary: A federal court has granted preliminary approval for a derivative settlement involving Wells Fargo, addressing litigation related to the bank's mortgage lending and diversity hiring practices. The settlement, which aims to benefit Wells Fargo itself rather than individual shareholders, was reached after extensive legal proceedings and mediation. A final court hearing is scheduled for May 2026 to determine if the agreement is fair and in the best interest of the company and its investors, potentially resolving significant ongoing litigation for the bank.

feed.title: Parker Hannifin declares $1.80 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.80 per share, payable on March 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 6, 2026. This marks their 303rd consecutive quarterly dividend and extends their streak of annual dividend increases to 69 years, placing them among the top S&P 500 companies for dividend growth. The announcement follows Parker-Hannifin's strategic move to acquire Filtration Group Corporation and positive analyst updates from CFRA, Susquehanna, and JPMorgan.

feed.title: Sallie Mae shares higher as Q4 earnings beat expectations By Investing.com
feed.summary: Sallie Mae (SLM) shares surged 7.5% in after-hours trading after the student loan provider reported fourth-quarter earnings that significantly exceeded analyst expectations and announced a new $500 million share repurchase program. The company reported EPS of $1.12, beating the consensus estimate of $0.94, driven by a provision credit for loan losses. Private education loan originations increased by 4% to $1.0 billion in Q4 and 6% for the full year 2025, reaching $7.4 billion.

feed.title: Should Value Investors Buy Asbury Automotive Group (ABG) Stock?
feed.summary: The article suggests that Asbury Automotive Group (ABG) is a strong value stock based on Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) and a Value grade of A. It highlights ABG's attractive P/B ratio of 1.26 and P/CF ratio of 7.16 compared to industry averages, indicating it may be undervalued. Investors are encouraged to consider ABG due to these valuation metrics and its positive earnings outlook.

feed.title: Preferred Bank Net Income Rises In Q4
feed.summary: Preferred Bank (PFBC) reported a significant increase in net income for the fourth quarter, reaching $34.8 million, up from the previous year. This translated to $2.79 net income per share, exceeding analyst expectations, primarily due to an $8.1 million occupancy charge. The bank also saw its revenue climb to $78.1 million, with its stock trading up 2.00 percent in pre-market hours.

feed.title: AptarGroup declares $0.48 dividend
feed.summary: AptarGroup has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share. This dividend is payable on February 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 6, 2026. This announcement highlights the company's commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

feed.title: Aptar Declares Quarterly Dividend and Announces 2026 Annual Meeting Details
feed.summary: AptarGroup, Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.48 per share, payable on February 25, 2026, to stockholders of record as of February 4, 2026. The company also declared that its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held virtually on May 6, 2026, with a record date for voting stockholders set for March 13, 2026. Additionally, Aptar will host a conference call on February 6, 2026, to discuss its fourth-quarter and year-end 2025 results.

feed.title: BNY Mellon Issues $1.55 Billion Callable Senior Notes
feed.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY Mellon) has issued $1.55 billion in callable senior notes, comprising fixed-to-floating rate and floating-rate notes, both maturing in 2030. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's funding profile and capital markets flexibility, supporting balance sheet management and future growth initiatives. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates BK stock as "Outperform" due to strong financial performance, technical momentum, and reasonable valuation.

feed.title: Emerson Electric Rose 2% Last Week. Here’s Why the Stock Could Still Reach $165
feed.summary: Emerson Electric's stock increased by 2% last week, trading near $150, driven by investor anticipation for its upcoming earnings report and focus on backlog conversion, margin performance, and cash flow. Analysts remain positive, reinforcing the stock's stability. A valuation model suggests a target price of $165, representing a 10.1% upside over 2.7 years, based on projected revenue growth, operating margins, and P/E multiple, indicating its fair valuation with future performance tied to execution rather than re-rating.

feed.title: Amazon.com to Webcast Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results Conference Call
feed.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) announced it will hold a conference call to discuss its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET. The event will be webcast live, and the audio and associated slides will be available for at least three months at www.amazon.com/ir. This announcement was made by Business Wire.

feed.title: AK3.DE Akamai Technologies (XETRA) closes at EUR 97.03 on 22 Jan 2026: most active stock, outlook
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (AK3.DE) closed at EUR 97.03 on XETRA, featuring high trading volume and attention. The stock shows constructive technicals, trading above its 50-day and 200-day average prices, and is rated "BUY" by Meyka AI with a B+ grade. Key financial metrics indicate relative value compared to the Technology sector, though risks like high leverage and market shifts are noted.

feed.title: Two BNY Mellon muni funds raise monthly income for investors
feed.summary: BNY Mellon Investment Adviser, Inc. announced that two of its municipal bond closed-end funds, BNY Mellon Strategic Municipal Bond Fund, Inc. (DSM) and BNY Mellon Strategic Municipals, Inc. (LEO), have increased their monthly distributions. The distributions, payable on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 12, 2026, will be $0.026 per share, reflecting a $0.003 increase due to higher yields on the funds' investments. BNY Investments manages $2.2 trillion in assets and is part of BNY, America's oldest bank with $59.3 trillion in assets under custody and/or administration.

feed.title: Associated Banc-Corp earnings beat by $0.02, revenue topped estimates
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) surpassed analyst expectations for its fourth-quarter earnings, reporting an EPS of $0.72 against an estimate of $0.70. The company also exceeded revenue forecasts, posting $389M compared to the estimated $382.1M. Following these results, ASB's stock price has shown positive performance, increasing by 7.35% in the last three months and 8.45% over the past year.

feed.title: CSX railroad profit slips 2% as shipping demand remained weak and severance costs hurt results
feed.summary: CSX announced a 2% slip in fourth-quarter profit, earning $720 million, or 39 cents per share, primarily due to weak shipping demand and $50 million in severance costs from recent layoffs. While revenue decreased slightly by 1% to $3.51 billion, the company anticipates only low single-digit revenue growth in 2026 and has withdrawn its 2027 targets. Despite these financial setbacks, CSX improved operational efficiency by completing major construction projects, leading to faster train speeds and better on-time delivery rates.

feed.title: Bank of New York Mellon issues $1.55 billion in senior notes due 2030
feed.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (NYSE:BK) has issued $1.55 billion in senior medium-term notes due 2030, comprising both fixed rate/floating rate callable senior notes and floating rate callable senior notes. This debt issuance adds to its existing total debt of approximately $75.16 billion. The announcement follows a strong fourth-quarter earnings report for 2025, which exceeded analyst expectations, leading several firms to raise their price targets for the company.

feed.title: BNY Mellon Municipal Bond Closed-End Funds Declare Distributions
feed.summary: BNY Mellon Investment Adviser, Inc. announced monthly distributions for its Strategic Municipal Bond Fund, Inc. (DSM) and Strategic Municipals, Inc. (LEO). The distribution for each fund is $0.026 per share, reflecting an increase of $0.003 due to higher yields on investments. These distributions are payable on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 12, 2026.

feed.title: BNY Mellon High Yield Strategies Fund Declares Dividend
feed.summary: The BNY Mellon High Yield Strategies Fund (NYSE: DHF) has declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.0175 per share, payable on February 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 5, 2026. This dividend, consistent with the previous month's declaration, comes from net investment income. BNY Investments, the fund's adviser, manages $2.2 trillion in assets and is part of BNY, America's oldest bank with $59.3 trillion in assets under custody.

feed.title: Valero Energy increases quarterly dividend by 6.2% to $1.20 per share
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation announced a 6.2% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $1.20 per share, marking the third consecutive year of dividend raises. The dividend is payable on March 9, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 5, 2026, and the company has maintained dividend payments for 37 consecutive years. Valero is set to release its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on January 29, 2026.

feed.title: Capital One acquiring fintech Brex for $5.2B
feed.summary: Capital One has announced its acquisition of the fintech company Brex for $5.2 billion. This deal marks one of the largest bank acquisitions of a fintech, further expanding Capital One's financial technology offerings. The news follows Capital One's recent financial results reported on Thursday afternoon.

feed.title: NiSource to Pay Quarterly Dividend of $0.30 per Share, Payable Feb. 20 to Holders of Record on Feb. 3
feed.summary: NiSource (NI) will pay a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share. The dividend is payable on February 20 to shareholders of record as of February 3. This announcement was made by MT Newswires on January 22, 2026.

feed.title: Clorox acquiring GOJO Industries for $2.25 billion
feed.summary: The Clorox Co. is acquiring Akron-based GOJO Industries, known for Purell hand sanitizer, for $2.25 billion in cash. The deal is expected to have net purchase price of $1.92 billion after tax benefits, with GOJO reporting nearly $800 million in annual sales. Both companies expressed excitement about combining their expertise to enhance health and hygiene solutions globally.

feed.title: A Glimpse Into The Expert Outlook On Cencora Through 11 Analysts
feed.summary: Cencora (NYSE: COR) has been analyzed by 11 analysts over the past three months, resulting in a diverse set of ratings from bullish to neutral. The average 12-month price target for Cencora is $393.82, an 11.98% increase from the previous average. The company shows strong financials with above-average market capitalization, positive revenue growth of 5.92%, and excellent net margin, ROE, and ROA, though it carries a high debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: Vaxcyte Advances Adult and Infant Programs for VAX-31, a Potential Best-in-Class, Next-Generation Pneumococcal Conjugate Vaccine
feed.summary: Vaxcyte, Inc. has provided an update on the advancement of its next-generation 31-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (VAX-31) across both adult and infant clinical programs. The company has dosed the first participants in a Phase 3 study for adults, OPUS-2, and plans to initiate another Phase 3 study, OPUS-3, in the first quarter of 2026. For the infant indication, Vaxcyte has completed enrollment in its Phase 2 dose-finding study.

feed.title: Aptar Declares Quarterly Dividend and Announces 2026 Annual Meeting Details
feed.summary: AptarGroup, Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.48 per share, payable on February 25, 2026, to stockholders of record as of February 4, 2026. The company will also hold its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders virtually on May 6, 2026, with a record date of March 13, 2026 for voting eligibility. Additionally, Aptar plans to discuss its fourth-quarter and year-end 2025 results on a conference call on February 6, 2026.
